name: @jfun/statespace
description: Verification Layer 3, packaged (docs/handbook/10-verification.md): adapter-based state-graph enumeration, dead-state proofs (backward reachability from goal), permissive-oracle filtering with a built-in soundness cross-check, and detector-coverage audit — 'if the player is provably stuck, does the game KNOW?'. The transition model, oracle, and detectors stay per-game.
